name: Luban No.7

skills.name: Suppressive Fire
skills.description: Every 5 Basic Attacks or the first Basic Attack after using a skill gains a piercing effect and deals continuous damage.

skills.name: Blowfish Grenade
skills.description: Throws a bomb at the target area, dealing damage and slowing all enemies hit.

skills.name: Shark Cannon
skills.description: Launches a rocket in the target direction, knocking back enemies in close range and dealing damage. Deals damage to enemies in range upon exploding on enemy heroes.

skills.name: Air Support
skills.description: Bombards the target location, slowing and dealing damage to enemies while gaining vision of the area.

tips: Luban No.7 is a Medium Marksman (Farm Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S with 52.0% win rate and 1.8% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Sparkforged Dagger → Boots of Dexterity → Eternity Blade → Daybreaker's Virtue → Doomsday → Sage's Sanctuary.
Run Tier for stats that match Luban No.7's Marksman kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Blowfish Grenade → Shark Cannon → Air Support → reposition. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for maximum damage and passive value.
Laning: Last-hit safely until first core item. Ping jungler for river vision; never face-check brush without minion cover.
Teamfight: Position behind frontline; attack closest safe target. Join fight only after enemy dive cooldowns are used.
Luban No.7 excels into Ying, Ukyo Tachibana, Lam. Avoid blind picking into Lian Po, Kaizer, Dun without team peel.

Luban No.7 is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Pick rate 1.8% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Luban No.7. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.

faqs.question: Is Luban No.7 good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Luban No.7 is Tier S Marksman with 52.0% win rate, 1.8% pick rate, and 0.2% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Strong meta pick for ranked.

faqs.question: What is the best Luban No.7 build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Sparkforged Dagger, Boots of Dexterity, Eternity Blade, Cloud Piercer, Doomsday, Sage's Sanctuary. Run Tier arcana with Flash. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Luban No.7?
faqs.answer: Pick Lian Po, Kaizer, Dun into Luban No.7. Deny Farm Lane resources early and force fights before Luban No.7 completes core items. Luban No.7 struggles when the enemy can dive and burst them.

faqs.question: Who does Luban No.7 counter?
faqs.answer: Luban No.7 is strong into Ying, Ukyo Tachibana, Lam according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Luban No.7 when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Farm Lane lane.

Pick rate 1.8% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Luban No.7. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.

faqs.question: What lane should Luban No.7 play?
faqs.answer: Luban No.7 is tagged Farm Lane in Camp export (Marksman). Last-hit safely until first core item. Ping jungler for river vision; never face-check brush without minion cover.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Luban No.7?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Tier arcana. Battle spell: Flash. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Luban No.7 or Hou Yi — which is better?
faqs.answer: Luban No.7 vs Hou Yi (Marksman, Tier S+): Hou Yi is 2.9% pick / 49.3% WR. Luban No.7 has +2.7% WR vs Hou Yi in Camp data. Choose Luban No.7 when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Hou Yi for Farm Lane comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Luban No.7?
faqs.answer: Optional ban when enemy spams Marksman; 1.8% pick rate but only 0.2% ban rate.
